# Archive

These files are the original Semester 1 unit files, superseded by the week-by-week restructure implemented in the Semester Restructure Plan (Updates 17-25).

**Do not edit these files.** They are preserved for reference only.

## Original Structure (superseded)

| File | Covered | Replaced By |
|------|---------|-------------|
| unit-1.md | Weeks 1-4: CCT, AI Landscape, Context Engineering, RAG | week-01.md through week-05.md |
| unit-2.md | Weeks 5-8: MCP, Secure Tool Design, RAG Architecture | week-03.md through week-08.md |
| unit-3.md | Weeks 9-12: Ethics, AIUC-1, OWASP, Bias | week-08.md, week-13.md, week-14.md |
| unit-4.md | Weeks 13-16: Multi-Agent, Sprints, Presentations | week-09.md through week-16.md |

## Why the Restructure?

The original structure had four problems identified in the plan:
1. Weeks 1-4 spent too long on analysis before building
2. Unit 3 interrupted building momentum with a standalone governance block
3. Multi-agent systems didn't appear until Week 13
4. Red teaming was entirely in Semester 2

The new week-by-week structure addresses all four: building starts in Week 1, governance is distributed through weeks 2-8, multi-agent appears in Weeks 9-10, and red teaming is in Weeks 13-14.

## Content Lineage

Content from the original unit files was extracted and reorganized into the new week files. No content was discarded; it was either retained in the new week file covering the same topic, or moved to a more appropriate week given the new progression.
